query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A figure sits in an interior space with rectangular objects suggesting computer monitors and office furniture visible nearby.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely overexposed and blurred interior scene where a seated figure and surrounding office furniture dissolve into washed-out, ghostly shapes, with extreme brightness and soft focus erasing virtually all surface detail and texture.
